problem id: 524b744b
category: bit_manipulation

rule: (ROT(5) AND NOT SHR(2)) XOR NOT SHL(6)

examples:
  10001100 -> 01101111
  10001000 -> 11101110
  00011100 -> 01111111
  01110111 -> 11011101
  00110011 -> 01011101
  01110101 -> 00011101
  01111110 -> 10111111
  01100000 -> 11111011
  11110010 -> 00111101

query: 11101111
predicted answer: 11111011
